title: 2026-04-18 · DCF exp_a vs exp_b — pre-FPS refactor, 1 seq vs subject-01
summary: Pre-FPS object_query_points refactor unblocks mixed-object batches. Apples-to-apples: 1-sequence training (exp_a) beats subject-01 multi-seq (exp_b) 11.8 vs 21.5 mm hand L2 and 9.2 vs 50.1 mm obj L2 at 2000 steps; multi-seq training itself is the regression. Includes MP4 camera-view overlay videos.

title: 2026-04-17 · Session Summary — MANO loaders smplx → manopth migration
summary: Root-caused v2 overlay brokenness: smplx and manopth disagree by up to 53mm on DexYCB pose_m inputs. Ported dexycb_loader and ho3d_loader to manopth (matching dex-ycb-toolkit), replaced bone topology with dex_ycb_toolkit._MANO_JOINT_CONNECT, re-rendered 27 overlays. Three tracking commits pushed; worktree edits held back for user sign-off before committing on feat/benchmark.

title: 2026-04-17 · Session Summary: DCF Per-View Fix + Memorization Diagnosis + Multi-Seq Grouped DDP
summary: Chained 5 commits: primary=0 fix, per-view DCF refactor (aggregator broadcasts extras along S), GPS + matched canonical + sliding S=4 eval, object-grouped batched DDP. 5 ACP jobs. Best: 5-frame tight overfit 8.7 mm hand L2 (v6 regime). Black-image ablation disproved pure memorization; multi-seq + chamfer run is confounded (P0: disambiguation experiment).

title: 2026-04-17 · Multi-Seq DDP Grouped Overfit (100 seq, 4 GPU)
summary: Multi-sequence + object-grouped batched DDP breaks the memorization shortcut. On same subject-01 eval, approach-phase chamfer/L2 drops 1.20→1.06 (shape preserved); absolute hand L2 rises to 131 mm because 200 steps over 100 sequences is ~10 updates per object — undertrained by design. Validates the hypothesis; next run: ≥2000 steps or warm-start.

title: 2026-04-17 · Full-Sequence GPS DCF Overfit (63 frames)
summary: Four-fix recipe applied to the full 63-frame overfit: hand L2 mean 64.1 mm, obj 41.0 mm, chamfer 69.3 / 40.5 mm; SVD stable at 0.456. Down from 124 mm without the fixes; above the 5-frame window's 8.7 mm because full-sequence DCF-from-scratch isn't saturated at 1000 steps.

title: 2026-04-17 · Session Summary: Benchmark Data-Validation Bring-Up (HO3D + DexYCB MANO gate PASS, DexYCB pose_y fix, overlay renderer)
summary: Phase 2 of HOI3R benchmark: fixed dataset paths, ran MANO validation gate (HO3D 3/3 PASS; DexYCB PASS after 5-line pose_y schema fix in loader), built render_mano_overlay.py and published 18 overlay PNGs. Three joint-order iterations — final MANO_TO_OPENPOSE remap correct for HO3D, still flagged wrong on DexYCB (labeled debug frames live for user inspection). HOT3D extraction ~38% at session end.

title: 2026-04-17 · GPS + Frames 30-34 DCF Overfit
summary: Four-fix follow-up to the per-view overfit: enable GPS skip at head, use matching rest-pose canonical at eval, restrict overfit to frames 30-34, and sliding S=4 causal eval. Mean hand L2 drops from 124 mm to 8.7 mm (v6 regime); shape preserved.

title: 2026-04-17 · MANO Overlay v3 — manopth fix (matches dex-ycb-toolkit)
summary: Root-caused the DexYCB skeleton issue: smplx and manopth disagree by up to 53mm on PIP/DIP/TIP joints for the same DexYCB input (wrist + MCPs match; only articulated joints diverge). Ported benchmark/data/dexycb_loader.py and ho3d_loader.py from smplx to manopth; bone topology now dex_ycb_toolkit._MANO_JOINT_CONNECT. 3 HO3D + 6 DexYCB overlays re-rendered (27 frames); toolkit-reference panel preserved below for pixel-match comparison.

title: 2026-04-17 · Per-View DCF Overfit
summary: Per-view DCF refactor (aggregator broadcasts extras along S; DCFBranch emits [B, S, N, 3] aligned with the main branch). 500-step overfit converges with stable hand SVD 0.355 vs the 0.077 rank-collapse of the 2026-04-16 DataLoader run.

title: 2026-04-17 · Benchmark Bring-Up: Design, Plan, Full Implementation (17/17 tasks, 209 tests pass)
summary: Designed & implemented the complete HOI3R benchmark framework on feat/benchmark: registry + two-stage CLI, unified hand/object/HOI/temporal metrics, GT data loaders, SAM 3D + MANO preprocessing, and adapters for MagicHOI, FP+HaWoR, and DCF across HO3D/DexYCB/HOT3D. 14 commits, ~13.7k LOC, 209 smoke tests passing.

title: 2026-04-17 · Session Summary: DCF DataLoader Investigation
summary: DataLoader migration completed but SVD collapse unresolved. 4 commits, 8 ACP jobs, 6 ablations all failed. Bugs fixed: CUDA OOB, GT/model FPS mismatch, frame-dependent canonical. Remaining: per-epoch PIL reload as last untested difference vs v6.

title: 2026-04-17 · DataLoader Ablation Study (6 Hypotheses, ALL Failed)
summary: All 6 ablations (scene loss, scene weight, gradient clip, frozen heads, canonical mesh, frame locality) collapse to SVD <0.12 vs v6's 0.400. Bug is elsewhere — only remaining difference is v6 pre-loads frames vs DataLoader reloads from disk.

title: 2026-04-17 · DataLoader Ablation Study (5 Hypotheses)
summary: ALL 5 configs show SVD collapse. Even DCF-only (no scene loss) collapses. Scene gradient dominance and canonical representation ruled out. Problem is in DataLoader frame resampling or training dynamics.

title: 2026-04-16 · DataLoader Overfit Verification (Canonical Fix)
summary: Fixed hand canonical mesh bug (was pose-dependent, now GPS-consistent rest-pose). SVD recovered: 0.034→0.587 peak. Confirmed DataLoader code path works.

title: 2026-04-16 · DCF DataLoader Multi-Sequence Training (Subject-01)
summary: DataLoader-based training with STream3R sampling: 4 seqs/batch, 100 sequences, 500 steps. Hand L1 0.186→0.051, Object L1 0.182→0.062. CUDA OOB + GT index bugs fixed.

title: 2026-04-16 · Session Summary: Scene-Loss Investigation & Multi-Sequence Training
summary: Two-day session: scene-loss alignment, root-cause (gradient-magnitude balance), multi-seq training. Winning config: sw=0.1, unfrozen → hand 8.5mm, obj 9.0mm, SVD 0.400=GT. 12 commits, 18 ACP runs, 5 bugs fixed.

title: 2026-04-16 · v6 1000-Step Overfit: sw=0.1 Wins Decisively (hand 8.5 / obj 9.0 / SVD 0.400)
summary: Head-to-head 1000-step single-sequence overfit: frozen scene heads (hand 27.6 / obj 35.7 / SVD 0.180) vs loss-weight-scene=0.1 unfrozen (hand 8.5 / obj 9.0 / SVD 0.400 = GT). sw=0.1 wins 3x on hand, 4x on object, with perfect hand rank. Frozen SVD degraded from 0.305 at 200 steps to 0.180 at 1000 — more training hurts frozen hand shape. Commit 44446b7.

title: 2026-04-15 · Why Frozen > Unfrozen on Hand Rank — Root Cause Diagnostic
summary: 9-hypothesis enumeration + Phase-2 cheap tests (H5, H8 refuted) + Phase-3 ACP sweep (H3, H4, H6). Root cause: gradient-magnitude balance on shared global_blocks. loss_weight_scene=1.0 pulls backbone toward low-rank attractor; DCF hand tokens inherit low-rank → hand collapses to plane. Fix: loss_weight_scene=0.1 + unfrozen gives hand 20.6 / obj 14.1 / SVD 0.373 (GT 0.40) — best single config across every run tested.

title: 2026-04-15 · DCF v4 — P1 / P2 Follow-Up Ablation (Unfrozen Scene Heads)
summary: Two follow-up bugs from v3 page: P1 static loss_pts3d_grad/loss_depth_grad (disable via --scene-grad-mode none), P2 rank-blind hand L1 loss (Chamfer via --hand-loss-type). Three unfrozen ablation runs on tracked frames 65-69. P1 alone: best L2 (hand 18.2, obj 15.8 mm) but hand still line (SVD 0.07). P2 alone (Chamfer): best rank (SVD 0.32 near GT 0.40) but L2 regresses. P12 combined: mixed. Finding: Chamfer not a drop-in for L1 — breaks per-vertex correspondence (MANO) and breaks rigid-body pose on objects. Recommendation: land P1 as default; test l1+chamfer hand-only before Phase 3. Commit 44446b7.

title: 2026-04-15 · DCF v3 — Coordinate Fix Recovers Scene Points (A/B)
summary: User flagged v2 scene-points looking degraded. Phase-1 diagnostic found the root cause: gt_pts3d was built in DexYCB-world-frame (1.64 m translation, 156° rotation) but point_loss supervises in first-view-camera-frame. Conf-loss optimiser collapsed pred world_points to a 0.47 m plane (55.7% valid). One-line fix (pass np.eye(4) to depthmap_to_absolute_camera_coordinates) restores 100% valid pixels and z q95=4.55 m. v3 B unfrozen now achieves best object L2 across all runs (12.6 mm). Commit c90bd52.

title: 2026-04-15 · DCF Scene Loss STream3R-Aligned — v2 A/B (Frozen vs Unfrozen)
summary: Rerun of the tracked-frames 65-69 A/B with all five STream3R-alignment fixes applied (+point_loss, 65535 filter, tighter valid mask, --num-views 4 multi-view, PP-crop+Lanczos). Scene-loss scalar now matches CausalLoss.compute_loss byte-for-byte. Unfreezing gap narrowed from v1's 6x/4x to 1.7x/1.2x — the 'unfreezing is catastrophic' conclusion was artifactual. v2 A frozen: 22.9/32.5 mm. v2 B unfrozen: 39.9/38.8 mm. Commit cbc5ba9.

title: 2026-04-15 · DCF Scene-Loss Audit vs STream3R Official (point_loss missing + GT viz)
summary: Kwarg-by-kwarg audit of our scene-loss call vs stream3r/loss/losses.py:1762. Three deviations found: (1) we skip point_loss on world pts3d (~40% of the scene-loss signal), (2) we don't filter the uint16 65535mm 'no reading' sentinel on DexYCB depth, (3) single-view iteration makes camera_loss degenerate (relative pose to self = identity). Includes visualisation of GT depth + valid mask + unprojected pts3d + pretrained STream3R prediction on tracked frame 67, plus 3D scatter comparing GT vs pretrained preds.

title: 2026-04-15 · DCF Scene-Heads A/B (Frozen vs Unfrozen) on Tracked Frames 65–69
summary: Follow-up A/B answering 'should we unfreeze camera_head/point_head/depth_head during DCF fine-tuning?'. Runs on tracked frames 65-69 (conv200 page was invalid — untracked sentinel GT). A=frozen heads reaches hand 22.5 mm / obj 20.1 mm; B=unfrozen @ lr 1e-5 reaches only hand 134.3 mm / obj 83.8 mm. Confirms smoke-stage freezing policy in docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md. Commit 754d2b2.

title: 2026-04-15 · DCF Real Scene Loss — 200-step Convergence Check (5 frames)
summary: 200-step convergence rerun of the real DexYCB depth+camera scene loss wired in commit 5288853. Hand L2 257→12.5 mm, object L2 596→22.8 mm, scene loss decreases monotonically. The 'scene loss does not converge' concern from the 5-step A2 smoke was a false alarm. ACP job om-mpgfphqc.

title: 2026-04-15 · Session Summary: TODO Resolution (Scene Loss, Video Render, Gen-Range CLI)
summary: Second session of the day. Executed three P0 TODOs from 2026-04-14: (A) Wired REAL scene loss via STream3R depth_loss + camera_loss with DexYCB GT; (B) Auto camera-view video render on training completion; (C) Contiguous --train-range/--eval-range CLI for generalization tests. 7 ACP jobs submitted, 5 definitive (all SUCCEEDED).

title: 2026-04-15 · Session Summary: GPS-Based DCF Point Encoding Fixes Hand Curve Bug
summary: Diagnosed and fixed the DCF hand 'curve' prediction bug. Root cause: DCF tokens lose per-point identity after 24 global attention layers (all share RoPE pos (0,0), and canonical_dim=0 removes the skip). Solution: frozen 16-dim Laplacian eigenvector (GPS) encoding as DCFPointEncoder input + raw GPS skip to trajectory head. Four ACP experiments: best config (GPS + GlobalTrained + 72 frames, 2000 steps) achieves 12.6mm hand L2 / 8.1mm obj L2 with spread ratio ≈1.0 (hand geometry preserved). Published via GitHub Contents API. Main commit: 18cce3a on feat/dcf.

title: 2026-04-15 · DCF smoke validation (final) — A/B/C all pass
summary: Three correctness smokes on feat/dcf: (A) REAL scene loss via stream3r depth_loss + camera_loss with DexYCB GT; (B) auto camera-view video render; (C) contiguous train/eval range CLI. All ACP jobs SUCCEEDED.

title: 2026-04-14 · DCF GPS-Based Point Encoding: Fixing the Hand Curve Bug
summary: Replaced Euclidean xyz with Laplacian eigenvector (GPS) encoding for DCF hand canonical points, with raw 16-dim GPS skip connection to trajectory head. Diagnosed root cause: canonical_dim=0 loses point identity after 24 global attention layers, causing all 256 hand points to collapse to mean trajectory (curve shape). Four ACP experiments: GPS frozen/trained vs no-GPS baseline (500 steps), plus full-sequence 72-frame overfit (2000 steps). Commit: 18cce3a.

title: 2026-04-14 · DCF Comprehensive Experiment Comparison (All 11 Experiments)
summary: Master comparison of all 11 DCF experiments from phase 1a baseline through frozen global_blocks. Key findings: (1) 200-step baseline (13mm hand) outperforms 500-step (21mm) due to feature degradation in shared global_blocks; (2) NLF barycentric sampling best overfit at 8mm/9mm hand/obj; (3) Scene loss preserves scene std (1.53 vs 0.40 without); (4) Hand memorizes on unseen frames (185mm test vs 20mm train) while object generalizes perfectly (16mm both). Tables include scene quality, hand geometry PCA, and strategy comparison for fixes.

title: 2026-04-14 · Session Summary: DCF Architecture Implementation & Validation
summary: Full-day session covering 9 experiments across DCF module implementation (62 smoke tests, 26 commits), encoding strategies (Fourier vs GPS), overfit validation, and generalization analysis. Critical findings: object trajectory generalizes perfectly (16mm train/test), but hand trajectory memorizes (20mm train vs 185mm test). Scene reconstruction collapses without scene losses. NLF barycentric sampling achieves best hand L2 (8mm vs 20mm FPS). Full-sequence 72-frame training confirms hand L2 stuck at 190mm.

title: 2026-04-14 · DCF Experiment Batch: Overfit + Generalization (Hand Memorizes, Object Generalizes)
summary: Two-experiment batch validating DCF architecture. Overfit 500 steps: Hand L1 0.369→0.011 (34x), Obj L1 0.350→0.007 (50x). Generalization test reveals a critical asymmetry: object trajectory generalizes perfectly (15.9mm train vs 16.4mm test, +0.5mm), but hand trajectory memorizes (20mm train vs 184mm test, +164mm gap). The hand branch ignores image features and collapses to a constant position. Next step: train on more frames to force image conditioning.

title: 2026-04-14 · DCF Camera-View Visualization: Scene + Hand + Object
summary: Camera-view RGB rendering of STream3R scene points with hand/object trajectory overlay. Compares Fourier encoding (hand 16.9mm L2) vs GPS encoding (hand 51.5mm L2). GPS needs more training.

title: 2026-04-11 · DCF Phase 1a: STream3R + DCF Full Pipeline Overfit
summary: First end-to-end STream3R encoder + DCF decoder overfit with coordinate-aligned supervision. Per-frame predictions in camera space. Hand L1=8.5mm, Object L1=9.1mm after 200 steps on 4-frame DexYCB clip.

title: 2026-04-11 · DCF Phase 1: DexYCB Single-Sequence Overfit
summary: Dynamic Correspondence Fields (DCF) architecture replaces Trellis.2 SLat pipeline. Phase 1 overfit on 8-frame DexYCB clip achieves 98.7% trajectory L1 reduction (1.258 → 0.016), validating the encode → predict trajectories → contact coupling pipeline. Point cloud visualizations confirm GT-prediction alignment across all frames. All outputs in STream3R world space W.

title: 2026-04-01 · Frame 30 Denorm + Depth-Ordered Overlay Fix
summary: The native TRELLIS decoder output is now lifted from normalized cube space back into the reference local metric bbox before hand/object pose transforms, and the overlay renderer now draws by camera depth. Frame 000030 no longer fails with non-empty object mesh + zero valid projections; object now produces 9 valid image projections, while a smaller residual object-collapse problem remains.

title: 2026-04-01 · Frame 30 Loss-Gap Repair Experiment
summary: A minimal loss repair added explicit empty-mesh and sparse-field presence penalties to the native TRELLIS training objective. On frame 000030, the final hand and object predictions remain non-empty and the earlier empty-mesh zero-geometry-loss collapse no longer survives to the end of training.

title: 2026-04-01 · Frame 30 Transition And Objective-Gap Diagnosis
summary: A step-wise native TRELLIS diagnosis traced frame 000030 through SDF sign transitions and loss terms. Hand collapses into all-nonnegative empty mesh at step 41, while object reaches empty mesh and zero geometry loss earlier at step 27 before its field becomes globally all-nonnegative at step 37.

title: 2026-03-31 · Frame 30 Three-Stage Diagnosis
summary: A dedicated diagnosis run checked raw mesh extraction, world-to-camera conversion, and camera-to-image projection on frame 000030. Both hand and object fail at raw mesh extraction with zero predicted vertices before any coordinate conversion is applied.

title: 2026-03-31 · Frame 30 Normalized-Space Native TRELLIS Overfit
summary: A forced single-image overfit on frame 000030 converged numerically under the current normalized-space decoder path, but both predicted meshes collapsed to empty outputs. The node is published as a negative result and a precise failure-mode record.

title: 2026-03-31 · Native TRELLIS Single-Frame Overfit On DexYCB
summary: The native sparse TRELLIS mesh decoder now runs end to end on a real visible-hand DexYCB frame. After seeding the decoder away from the empty-mesh collapse, an 80-step CUDA overfit reduced total loss from 5.63 to 0.44 and produced non-empty hand and object meshes.

title: 2026-03-31 · Second DexYCB Overfit On Visible-Hand Frame
summary: The real one-sequence overfit now skips empty-hand opening frames and reruns on frame 000009, with separate GT overlay, prediction overlay, and side-by-side comparison images. Hand and object decoding remain on the same shared decoder path.

title: 2026-03-31 · DexYCB One-Sequence Overfit Visualization Pack
summary: A fixed-seed visualization rerun now exports loss curves, overlay projections, 3D scatter plots, and PLY point clouds for the first real DexYCB one-sequence overfit. The object aligns substantially better than the hand in the current bootstrap model.

title: 2026-03-31 · First Real DexYCB Single-Sequence Overfit Result
summary: The first real DexYCB Trellis overfit now runs end to end with toolkit-aligned raw loading and explicit Stream3R world transforms. A CUDA run on one concrete sequence/camera reduced total loss from 1.8684 to 0.7956 in 80 steps.

title: 2026-03-31 · DexYCB Real-Data Readiness Probe
summary: The Trellis overfit runner now probes real DexYCB data roots through --data-root, reports processed-root readiness, surfaces the processed archive path, and resolves concrete sequence/frame targets once canonical manifest metadata is present.

title: 2026-03-30 · Structured Trellis Decoder Replaced Dense Placeholder
summary: The mesh codec now emits structured latent grids and the shared hand/object decoder now decodes those grids with 3D residual and upsample blocks. The new path passes 12 smoke tests and re-runs the single-sequence synthetic overfit.

title: 2026-03-30 · First Synthetic Single-Sequence Overfit Result
summary: CUDA synthetic overfit completed for one demo sequence. Total loss dropped from 0.4651 to 0.0561 in 80 steps, establishing the first runnable Trellis mesh bootstrap training loop.

title: 2026-03-30 · Trellis Bootstrap Scaffold + DexYCB Format Alignment
summary: Remote feature branch is live with Trellis bootstrap docs, configs, mesh branch modules, a single-sequence synthetic overfit runner, and the DexYCB processed-data contract aligned before dataset extraction completes.
